rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score of 8/10 and the substantive reasoning is unchanged: strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience as the core strength, and lack of Nest.js plus limited Kotlin/Java as the core concerns. The wording differs slightly (e.g. mentioning Vitest, DLang, open-source contributions), but these are ordinary run-to-run rephrasings of the same assessment and none of them reference the candidate's location, nationality, or the Berlin/Bucharest change. No score movement, no new location-keyed concern.
